name: Mersey Point Smoked Mackerel Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and bones from smoked mackerel.
2. Mix the smoked mackerel with cream cheese, lemon juice, onion, celery, and horseradish in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Spread the mixture onto plastic wrap.
5. Form the mixture into a log shape.
6. Refrigerate the log until it becomes firm.
7. Combine crushed almonds and chopped parsley.
8. Roll the chilled log in the almond and parsley mixture.
9. Serve with crackers.
